signatureMove.name: Regain Control
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain then it is Removed from Play and replaced with Anya Bartol. Anya Bartol gains energy and suffers Wds equal to those already on this character along with all Moonstones it's carrying and any stat modifications or abilities it has gained. If this character was the active character, continue the current activation with Anya Bartol; it may not Jog if Striga Anya already did this turn.

abilities.name: Summoned Being
abilities.description: You cannot choose this character for your Troupe.

abilities.name: Supernatural Strength
abilities.description: Increase all Melee Dmg dealt by +2. All Melee Dmg caused by this character counts as Magical instead of the listed type.

abilities.name: Blood Drinker
abilities.description: If an enemy is slain during a round of melee by this character, this character gains +3 energy.

abilities.name: Replace Necklace
abilities.description: This character gains +1 energy. Then it is Removed from Play and replaced with Anya Bartol. Anya Bartol gains energy and suffers Wds equal to those already on this character along with all Moonstones it's carrying and any stat modifications or abilities it has gained. Continue Striga Anya's activation with this turn.
